name: ultimatelinks
description: ULTIMATELINKS - Your Gateway to Unlimited Access

scripts.start: echo 'Static site - no server needed for Google Cloud Run'
scripts.build: echo 'No build process required for static HTML site'

build.dockerfile:
FROM nginx:alpine
COPY . /usr/share/nginx/html
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ['nginx', '-g', 'daemon off;']

headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'
